note: S2T B=1 TTFT p50 (client, ms) under three CPU co-residency conditions, identical workload/model/server.
interpretation: TTFT path is CPU/IPC-poll-bound (4 cross-process hops, each with ~1ms poll/sleep) and contention-sensitive; decode/ITL is GPU-CUDA-graph-bound and stays ~flat. The ~0.30s fair-b1 figure did NOT reproduce in isolation.
